channel.title: ABS Astreon · Writing
channel.description: Essays and build notes on independent software and design.

item.title: Starting on two wheels
item.description: The gear I bought, the gear I'm still buying, and a few things I'd tell myself before my first lesson.

item.title: How I built Lovable-Eject
item.description: Lovable's export gives you back code, not a deployable project. Why I built the missing afternoon as one command, and why it's npx-only.

item.title: How I built ParkMoto
item.description: Why scattered council data turns London motorcycle parking into folk knowledge, and what happened when I tried to put it all on one map.

item.title: How I built NotchWise
item.description: Why the notch turned out to be the right place for a flashcard app, and the eight-second rule that shaped the rest of the design.
